narrative:
Pickerington City H (precinct in Fairfield County) has 867 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
